items.title: Define notification infrastructure (WebSocket vs SSE)
items.description: Evaluate and select the real-time notification technology. Document the decision with rationale, expected concurrent user count, and infrastructure requirements.

items.title: Add task status field with state machine
items.description: Extend the task data model with a 'status' field. Define the state machine: TODO → IN_PROGRESS → DONE. Add validation to prevent invalid transitions.
acceptance_criteria: Status field added to task model

items.title: Implement RBAC permission matrix
items.description: Implement role-based access control for Admin, Manager, and Developer roles as specified in REQ-2.
acceptance_criteria: Manager can CRUD team tasks only
Developer can only edit assigned tasks

items.title: Add notification preference settings
items.description: Allow users to configure which notification types they receive (task assigned, task updated, due date reminder).
acceptance_criteria: Preference UI accessible from user profile

items.title: Write integration tests for notification delivery
items.description: Verify that notifications are delivered within 5 seconds of the triggering event under normal load conditions.
acceptance_criteria: P95 delivery time < 5 seconds under 100 concurrent users
